name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 17 Oct 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": v6.73"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Australia Post public rates have been updated to the new pricing."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the Neto Inventory add-on so that the install button works correctly."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in purchase order PDFs so that carriage returns are no longer stripped out."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with disputes so that they link to the sales order correctly."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue on the sales orders page so that the "},{"text":"Delivery on","bold":true},{"text":" field displays correctly."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in Direct Freight manifests so that the receiver email is populated correctly."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
